title: Rust RPL routing: error pattern mismatch in test
description:
File: rust/lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs
Line: 474

Test uses 'matches!(err, Err(RplError::BufferTooSmall(_)))' but the original code returned Err(RplError::BufferTooSmall) without wrapped payload. The fix changed the error to wrap BufferTooSmall struct, requiring the test pattern to match. This is a P3 because it's test-only and the actual behavior is improved (more structured error info).
close_reason: Test passes - pattern matches correctly with BufferTooSmall(_) wildcard
